mbackup
  • mbackuplib package
  • View page source

mbackuplib package

Submodules

mbackuplib.mbackup module

Module that defines the main mbackup class.

class mbackuplib.mbackup.Mbackup(source, dest)

Bases: object

The Mbackup class is defined as an Abstract Base Clases this class implements the main backup functionality other classes extend this class to handle the interface with the actual backup program. These are the abstract properties:

  • _exe : the actual backup executable.

  • _hostSeperator : the sperator after the host used in target / connection path in the backup program. (This seperator is different between backup programs.)

These are the abstract methods:

  • _getOptions: the options to pass to the backup program.

This class uses subprocess to execute the backup program and threading to capture and print the output of the backup program.

When the backup is started, start() method, the backup program is executed with the stdout and stderr pipes redirected to subprocess. Then two threads are started, stream_watcher() method, to capture and put the output from the stdout and stdin in a queue. In the running parent process this queue is read, readOutputQueue() method, untill the subprocess is finished.

backup()

Start the backup

getFullDest()

Add host and user to the destination path to create a target path used by the backup program.

Retruns:

Target path containg the target path and if set the host and user.

isFinished()

Check if backup program is finished

Returns:

True or false

kill()

Kills the running backup program

readOutputQueue()

Reads the queue and passes output to logger.

setHost(h)

Set the target host.

setSource(s)

Set the source path and check if the path is exists is absolote and readable.

Raises:

MbackupError – If path is not absolute or readable.

setUser(u)

Set the user to be used on target host.

start(options)

Start the backup

Parameters:

options (list) – options to pass to backup program.

Returns:

Returncode of the backup program.

stream_watcher(identifier, stream)

Loop over a stream and put each line in a queue.

Parameters:

  • identifier (string) – used to keep track of different streams because all data goes to the same queue.

  • stream (stream) – stream to read.

mbackuplib.mbackuperror module

Module that defines the MbackupError class.

exception mbackuplib.mbackuperror.MbackupError

Bases: Exception

Class used for raises errors inside a Mbackup class or subclass

mbackuplib.rdiffbackup module

Module that defines the Rdiffbackup class.

class mbackuplib.rdiffbackup.Rdiffbackup(source=None, dest=None, verbosity=3)

Bases: Mbackup

Class that interfaces with the rdiffbackup program. This class implements the Mbackup abstract base class.

getVerbosityString()

Builds the string of the verbosity paramater to pass to options of rdiffbackup.

Returns

String with verbosity level.

listIncrementSizes()

Lists the increment sizes.

Returns:

Return code of rdiffbackup.

listIncrements()

Starts the rdiffbackup program to list all increments.

Returns:

Return code of rdiffbackup.

remove(time)

Starts the rdiffbackup program to remove backups older than the given time.

Parameters:

time (string) – Rdiffbackup format of time to remove backups.

Returns:

Return code of rdiffbackup.

setVerbosity(v)

Sets the verbosity level of rdiffbackup

Raises:

MbackupError – if verbosity level is invalid (0-9) is valid.

mbackuplib.rsyncbackup module

Module that defines the Rsyncbackup class.

class mbackuplib.rsyncbackup.Rsyncbackup(source=None, dest=None, verbosity=False)

Bases: Mbackup

Class that interfaces with the rsync program. This class implements the Mbackup abstract base class.

Module contents

Package mbackuplib, no functionality implemented here.
